LK NEHR Sri Lanka Patient Summary (IPS based) Implementation Guide, published by Ministry of Health, Sri Lanka. This guide is not an authorized publication; it is the continuous build for version 0.1.0 built by the FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. This version is based on the current content of https://github.com/lk-gov-health-hiu/lk-nehr-fhir-ips and changes regularly. See the Directory of published versions

  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

    "status" : "generated",
    "div" : "<div xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\"><p>This case-sensitive code system <code>http://fhir.health.gov.lk/ips/CodeSystem/cs-medical-conditions-additional</code> defines the following codes:</p><table class=\"codes\"><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\"><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Display</b></td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A00<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A00\"> </a></td><td>Cholera</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A01<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A01\"> </a></td><td>Typhoid and paratyphoid fevers / enteric fever</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A02<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A02\"> </a></td><td>Other salmonella infections / dysentery</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A03<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A03\"> </a></td><td>Shigellosis / dysentery</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A04<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A04\"> </a></td><td>Other bacterial intestinal infections / dysentery</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A05<a style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A15<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A15\"> </a></td><td>Respiratory tuberculosis, bacteriologically and histologically confirmed</td></tr><tr><td style=\"white-space:nowrap\">A16<a name=\"cs-medical-conditions-additional-A16\"> </a></td><td>Respiratory tuberculosis, not confirmed bacteriologically or histologically</td></tr><tr><td
